prompt: /tdd implement a REST API with 4 independent endpoints

assertions.text: Decomposes into 4 work units with no inter-dependencies
Dispatches up to --parallel (default 4) concurrent unit pipelines
Each unit gets its own Agent tool spawn (Test Writer, Code Writer, reviewers)
Each unit calls verify-red.ts and verify-green.ts independently
All 3 reviews run for each unit (not skipped for parallel batches)
update-state.ts called per-unit as each completes
Phase 5 final integration test covers all 4 endpoints together
